name: Cardamom Coffee Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald milk and allow it to cool to lukewarm.
2. Crumble the cake yeast into a bowl, add 1 tablespoon sugar and the lukewarm milk.
3. Gradually beat in 6 cups of sifted flour; continue beating until smooth. Cover well and let rise until light and doubled in bulk, about 1-1/2 hours.
4. Add softened butter, remaining sugar, salt, egg yolks, cardamom, and 5 cups flour to the dough. Mix thoroughly. Place the remaining 1/4 cup flour on a floured surface for kneading.
5. Turn out the dough and knead until smooth and elastic. Place in a greased bowl. Cover well. Let rise until doubled in bulk, about 1-1/2 hours.
6. Cut the risen dough in half for two coffee cakes (braid). Cut each half into 3 pieces. Roll each piece into a roll that is approximately 16 inches long.
7. Pinch the three rolls together at one end and braid. Place the braid on a baking sheet. Make a second braid and place it on another baking sheet.
8. Allow the braids to rise until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes. Brush each braid with 1 tablespoon milk and sprinkle with 6 tablespoons sugar.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25-30 minutes. Yield: 2 coffee cakes
